onboarding.welcomeDesc: A decentralized password manager. Your vault is encrypted and synced across your devices — only you hold the keys.
onboarding.createPasskeyDesc: Your passkey is stored on this device and used to derive your vault encryption key via WebAuthn PRF.
onboarding.mnemonicDesc: Write down these 12 words in order. They are the only way to recover your vault on a new device.
onboarding.mnemonicWarning: Never share these words. NodeZero cannot recover them for you.
onboarding.mnemonicVerifyDesc: Confirm 3 random words to prove you've saved your phrase.
onboarding.verifyError: Incorrect word. Please check your recovery phrase.

unlock.title: Unlock NodeZero
unlock.desc: Authenticate with your passkey to access your vault.

recovery.title: Recover Your Vault
recovery.desc: Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to access your vault.

errors.prfNotSupported: WebAuthn PRF is not supported on this device/browser. Use recovery phrase.
errors.noVault: No vault found. Please complete onboarding.
errors.decryptFailed: Decryption failed. Wrong key or corrupted data.
